title: ranunculus monspeliacus subsp. saxatilis
intro: Ranunculus monspeliacus subsp. saxatilis, also known as Saxatile Buttercup, is a subspecies of the Ranunculus monspeliacus plant, a perennial herbaceous plant with yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Ranunculus monspeliacus subsp. saxatilis include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to help reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the urinary system. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including urinary tract infections and skin conditions.
